rationale: Optimizations target different independent layers (React rendering, Data Caching, and Deployment config). They can be implemented sequentially with clear boundaries.

phases.name: RSC Migration
capabilities: Refactor client data fetching to Server Components

phases.name: Caching Implementation
capabilities: Implement Next.js cache() and unstable_cache for Prisma

phases.name: Config Adjustments
capabilities: Align Vercel regions and DB connection limits
